title: Pondicherry, Puducherry — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pondicherry, Puducherry: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pondicherry is a city in Puducherry with a population of 250,000. A former French colony on the Coromandel Coast, known for its French Quarter, serene beaches, and Sri Aurobindo Ashram.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
